verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Ever let it be that I would praise You, Ever let it be that I would please You, Never let it be that I will turn away. Ever let it be that I would love You, Never let there be any gods above You, Ever let it be that I will sing Your praise.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Always and forever keep me walking in Your way, Never let me go astray. Always and forever lead me, I need You day by day. Ever let it be, ever let it be, Ever let it be that I will sing Your praise.
